titleStmt.title: SII 24.405: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 405. (A.R. No. 24 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of gold and land for offerings to god Raṅganātha on the second day of the festival called Bhūpati Uḍaiyar-tirunāḷ, in the month of Tai by Ellamarasar, son of Anantayyar, the mace-bearer (chinnattaḍi piḍikkum) to the god and a resident of Pādiri-kuppam (Pāṭala-grāma) in Chandragirirājya. The gift land is said to be situated in Pudukkuḍi in Maḻa-nāḍu. The inscription contains a Sanskrit version in nine verses written in Grantha characters. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1453, Khara, Dhanus, ba. 5, Wednesday, Magha correspond to A.D. 1531, November 29, Wednesday; the tithi ended at ·96 on the previous day; ·94

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī man mahārājādhirājan rājaparameśvaran śrī vīrapratāpan Accuta- devamahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāptam 1000 4 100 5 10 3 Itin mel cellāniṉṟa karasamvassarattu dhanuṉāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pañcamiyum budha- vāramum peṟṟa makanakṣatrattu ṉāḷ perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku Ātreya gotra- ttu ĀlśāyanaRead āśvalāyana sūtrattu cantragiri rājyam pātirikkuppam Aṉantayyan putran Ellamaracar Uṭaiyamāka pūpati Uṭaiyar tiruṉāḷ Āṉa vaṭakarai rājarājavaḷaṉāṭṭu maḻaṉāṭṭu kīḻaimuṟi perumāḷ tiruviḷai Āṭṭam Āṉa putukkuṭi viṉāyakaṉ koyilukku kiḻakku meṟpaṭiyūr kiḻakkoṭi vāykkālukku teṟku Utāramaṅkalam Ellaikku meṟku
Ayyaṉār koyilukkum Utāramaṅkalam Ellaikkum vaṭakku Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa Iḷam kamukuvaippu Uḷppaṭa yirājavipāṭaṉ ṉāl puñcaikkuḻi 4 1000kku vilai Āka śrī paṇṭārattile mutaliṭṭa cakkaram poṉ 10� Inta toppukku perumāḷ Ēṟi Aruḷukiṟatukku poliyūṭṭu Āka mutaliṭṭa poṉ . 6 10 kku mātam 1 kku nūṟṟukku Iraṇṭu paṇam viḻukkāṭu Āka vaṭṭikku mātam 1 kku poṉ . 1 U 2 . Āka varuṣam 1 kku poṉ 10 4 U 4 Inta poṉ patiṉālum paṇam ṉālum koṇṭe pūpativuṭaiyār tiruṉāḷāna taittiruṉāḷ Iraṇṭām tiruṉāḷukku Inta tiruttoppuca ku perumāḷ Eḻunta(a)ruḷi Amutu ce
ytaruḷum taḷikai 5 10ý vecca Amutu kūṉ 5 10ý Atirasam vaṭai 3 100ý cukiyaṉ 3 100ý pori Amutu 6 100 Aṭaikkāy Amutu Ilai Amutum cātti Aruḷum cāttuppaṭi 2 10 5m paṉṉīr cempu 1ý tirukkāvaṇattil tirukkai vaḻakkam parivaṭṭac celavu mutalāṉa pala kaṭṭaḷaikaḷum Ācantrārkkastāyiyāka naṭakka kaṭavatākavum . Intat tiruttoppil tiruppaḷḷittāmam kaṟiyamutu mullaikkuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalam muṭaiyār maḻavarāyar payir(c) ceytu śrī paṇṭārattile mutaliṭak kaṭavarākavum . Ituvum tirumuṉ Alaṅkāram Āka ciṉṉattaṭi piṭikkum Aṉantayar puttiraṉ Ellamaracaṟku tirumukam tiruviḷamRead ‘tiruvuḷam’
paṟṟina paṭi Āle Ācantrārkkastāyiyāka naṭakka kaṭavatākavum § lakṣmīvandye śakā bdedāllikṣmīRead llakṣmīmnāthāya raṅgiṇe . grāmannavākhyam bhūsāragrāmam kaścana bhūsuraḥ 1 Ātreyagotrāt śaśigotrarāṣṭrādanan=ta gotrādabhava dvijendrāt . gotrārimitra pratimapratāpaḥ putrassumitraḥ karuṇaika pātram .Read llakṣmīm * vetriRead vetri hare raṅgapatera trekṣātrassadharmmaḥ kṛtagātrabandhaḥ . yātrādimātrejita śatrupāḷi kṣetrassumitrāsutavat pavitraḥ . 3 netrikṛtā tāmasasarvaśāstraḥ śrotrevahan śrotriyavacamiddhām . mātrā samānannikhilātithīnām sātrāśanamyaḥ sattam ddāti . 4 Āpāṭalaiḥ pāṭalajātapuṣvairāmoditāt pāṭalanāmadheyāt . grāmādya
Āsīt hṛtaṛt purāprāksaṅgrāmadhīraścaturāgragaṇyaḥ . 5 Advitīya mapi pūrvabhāvitañcakramellamarasassamarppayat . grāmameva navanāmadheyinam kāmadevajanakāya kāmadam . 6 . kṣāmepi . rāma nnayanābhirāmam grāmam sarāmārccitaraṅgiṇedāt . Ārāmadhāmānamagādhavāpyām rāmāsvarāmā ramaya ntiyatra . 7 raṅgeśitustadyātrayārmaḻa veśomahāmatiḥ . svātandrya grahaṇai sarvanirvāhepi bhavatvayam . 8 puṣpavante prakāśe te rodasyoryyāvadut prabhau . tāvat kṛtiriyam bhūmāvāstāmābhūta samplavam . 9 śubhamastu §
Digital edition of SII 24.405 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
